name: BaseHead
source_code:
// src/components/BaseHead.astro
---
import '../styles/global.css'

import { Font } from 'astro:assets'

import OgImage from '../assets/og.jpg'

import { SITE_TITLE } from '../consts'

import type { ImageMetadata } from 'astro'

interface Props {
  description: string
  title: string
  image?: ImageMetadata
}

const canonicalURL = new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site)

const { description, title, image = OgImage } = Astro.props

const pageTitle = `${title} | ${SITE_TITLE}`

const websiteSchema = {
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebSite',
  name: SITE_TITLE,
  url: Astro.site,
}

const webpageSchema = {
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'WebPage',
  name: pageTitle,
  description,
  url: canonicalURL,
  isPartOf: {
    '@type': 'WebSite',
    name: SITE_TITLE,
    url: Astro.site,
  },
}
---

<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="generator" content={Astro.generator} />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://media.ethicalads.io" />

<link rel="canonical" href={canonicalURL} />
<link rel="sitemap" href="/sitemap-index.xml" />
<link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title="HyperUI RSS" href="/rss.xml" />
<link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/favicon.ico" />

<title>{pageTitle}</title>
<meta name="title" content={pageTitle} />
<meta name="description" content={description} />

<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
<meta property="og:url" content={Astro.url} />
<meta property="og:title" content={pageTitle} />
<meta property="og:description" content={description} />
<meta property="og:image" content={new URL(image.src, Astro.url)} />
<meta property="og:site_name" content={SITE_TITLE} />

<meta property="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
<meta property="twitter:url" content={Astro.url} />
<meta property="twitter:title" content={pageTitle} />
<meta property="twitter:description" content={description} />
<meta property="twitter:image" content={new URL(image.src, Astro.url)} />

<Font cssVariable="--font-google-sans-flex" preload />

<script is:inline defer src="https://media.ethicalads.io/media/client/ethicalads.min.js"></script>

<script type="application/ld+json" is:inline set:html={JSON.stringify(websiteSchema)} />
<script type="application/ld+json" is:inline set:html={JSON.stringify(webpageSchema)} />

const pageTitle = `${title} | ${SITE_TITLE}`

const websiteSchema = {

visual_summary: A BaseHead component is used for setting the title, description, and image of a webpage, along with metadata for schema.org and Open Graph.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: BaseHead
Description: A BaseHead component is used for setting the title, description, and image of a webpage, along with metadata for schema.org and Open Graph.
Style: default
Interactions: 
Tags: seo, metadata, title, description, image

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
